headlines.title: Former Rep. Barney Frank, champion of Wall Street reform and gay rights trailblazer, dies at 86
headlines.description: Barney Frank, the quick-witted Massachusetts congressman and liberal lion who helped overhaul Wall Street regulations after the 2008 financial crisis and made history as one of the first openly gay members of Congress, died Wednesday, his sister confirmed to NBC Boston

headlines.title: DOJ indicts Raúl Castro over fatal 1996 civilian planes’ shooting
headlines.description: The Justice Department indicted former Cuban president Raúl Castro on Wednesday in connection to the 1996 shooting of two civilian planes that killed four Cuban Americans.

headlines.title: Pennsylvania progressive Chris Rabb says day one priority will be to ‘de-Trumpify’ the government
headlines.description: Pennsylvania State Rep. Chris Rabb (D) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss his winning strategy following his victory in the Democratic primary for Pennsylvania’s third Congressional district.

headlines.title: Kornacki: Rep. Thomas Massie’s loss shows that when Trump ‘wants you out, you're out’
headlines.description: NBC News Chief Data Analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press NOW to break down the results from Tuesday's primary elections after Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) was defeated by Trump-backed candidate Ed Gallrein. NBC News correspondents Julie Tsirkin and Garrett Haake along with NBC News reporters Ben Kamisar and Bridget Bowman discuss President Trump’s influence over the Republican primary races.

headlines.title: What GOP officials are hopeful — and worried — about six months from the midterms
headlines.description: President Donald Trump isn’t on the ballot this year, but with roughly six months before Election Day, he’ll still likely be the biggest factor in determining the fortunes of the Republican Party

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Rep. Barry Moore and Jared Hudson go to a runoff in Alabama GOP Senate primary
headlines.description: NBC News projects Moore didn’t clear the 50% threshold to advance to the general election. His runoff opponent remains unclear.

headlines.title: Senate advances resolution to end Iran war as GOP Sen. Bill Cassidy flips to support it
headlines.description: The Senate voted to move forward with a resolution to force President Donald Trump to end the war in Iran, a breakthrough for the Democratic-led effort.

headlines.title: DOJ official told GOP ally that big payouts were coming for Jan. 6 defendants
headlines.description: Months before the $1.7 billion fund was announced, Justice Department official Ed Martin said Capitol rioters would get millions, even if it took until 2028.

headlines.title: Jan. 6 officers sue over $1.8B pot they call ‘slush fund’ for ‘insurrectionists’
headlines.description: Jan. 6 officers sue over $1.8B pot they call ‘slush fund’ for ‘insurrectionists’

headlines.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
What to watch for tonight in Thomas Massie’s unique district: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Steve Kornacki dives into the key places to watch in Rep. Thomas Massie’s district tonight as he tries to fend off a GOP primary challenger backed by President Donald Trump.
